headline: Assessing Align Technology (ALGN) Valuation After Earnings Surprise And Institutional Buying
summary: Align Technology (ALGN) has been back on investors’ radar after a 10.77% earnings surprise, 5.3% revenue growth in the latest quarter, and a sizable stake increase from Capital International Inc. CA. See our latest analysis for Align Technology. Despite the recent 1-day share price return decline of 1.61% and a 7-day share price return decline of 5.61%, Align’s earnings surprise, revenue growth and participation in SprintRay’s Midas World Tour have kept attention on its role in digital...
